description: Computes and visualizes the shortest distance between two skew (non-intersecting, non-parallel) 3D lines.
utility: Find skew distance between two 3D lines

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
L1 = line3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 0, 0), point3d(G, 1, 0, 0))
L2 = line3d(G, point3d(G, 0, 1, 0), point3d(G, 0, 1, 1))
d = skew3d(G, L1, L2)
d = skew3d(G, L1, L2, c(red), s(2))
